title: Push to deploy
description: Connect your GitHub or GitLab repo. Every push to main deploys automatically. Every PR gets a preview URL. Zero config.

title: Branch previews
description: Every branch gets its own live environment. Share the URL with your team, client, or QA. Deleted automatically when the branch is merged.

title: One-click rollback
description: Something broke in production? Roll back to any previous deploy instantly. No SSH, no commands, no stress.

title: Built-in observability
description: Logs, metrics, and traces in one place. No Datadog tax. Filter by deploy, by service, by time range.

title: Any stack
description: Node, Go, Python, Ruby, Rust, static sites. If it runs in Docker, it deploys on Shipfast. Bring your own Dockerfile or use ours.

title: Multi-region
description: Deploy to São Paulo, New York, Frankfurt or Tokyo. Failover routing included. CDN edge caching for static assets.
